en.question: Ram walks 5 km North, turns right, walks 3 km. How far from start?
en.explanation: 5N+3E forms right triangle. √(25+9)=√34≈5.83 km. Closest: 6 km.

hi.question: राम 5km उत्तर, दाएँ 3km। आरंभ बिंदु से दूरी?

en.question: Man walks 30m South, left 20m, left 30m. Which direction facing?

hi.question: 30m दक्षिण, बाएँ 20m, बाएँ 30m। किस दिशा में?

en.question: Evening before sunset, A's shadow fell to his right. B facing A. B facing which direction?
en.explanation: Sun in West. Shadow to right means right=West, so A faces North. B facing A faces South.

hi.question: शाम, सूर्यास्त से पहले, A की छाया उसके दाएँ। B, A के सामने। B किस ओर?
hi.explanation: सूर्य पश्चिम में, दायाँ=पश्चिम, A उत्तरमुखी। B दक्षिणमुखी।

en.question: Man walks 3km East, turns right, walks 4km. Distance from start?
Ravi walks 10m North, 6m East, 10m South. Direction and distance from start?
A North of B. C East of B. D South of C. D w.r.t A?
en.explanation: A is N of B. C is E. D is S of C. D is SE of A.

hi.question: A, B के उत्तर। C, B के पूर्व। D, C के दक्षिण। D, A से?

en.question: Cyclist 30km North, right 40km. Distance from start?
Shyam 5km South, 3km West, 5km North. Direction from start?
